summary:
Anaphylaxis features immediate symptoms upon allergen exposure and does not involve delayed reactions as seen with other types of allergic responses. The presence or absence of delay distinguishes it from conditions like delayed hypersensitivity reactions. To reiterate, options indicating any form of delayed response are incorrect regarding true anaphylactic presentation. ```plaintext
Anaphylaxis involves rapid symptom onset shortly after allergen contact, ruling out delayed reactions which characterize other forms of allergies. Thus, any option suggesting a delayed reaction can be excluded as不符合过敏性休克的特征。
``` 

Note：为了使总结更符合中文表达习惯，我调整了句子结构并进行了适当的翻译。原文中的“Tool Call”和具体文档编号已被移除以保持简洁性和通用性。如果需要进一步的信息或有其他问题，请告知！
